sessions.title: Security Hardening
planned_tasks: Enable CSRF middleware — fix httponly bug, wire frontend interceptor (4A)
Fix 8 raw fetch() calls needing manual CSRF token injection
Complete tenant isolation pattern — fix 2 remaining violations (4C)
Fix TenantManager._validation_cache test coupling (4F)
tasks_completed: CSRF: Fixed httponly/secure bugs, added exempt_prefixes + API key bypass, fixed Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware ExceptionGroup bug (JSONResponse instead of HTTPException), enabled in app.py with comprehensive exemptions
CSRF: Wired Axios request interceptor for automatic CSRF header injection on state-changing requests
CSRF: Fixed SystemSettings.vue raw fetch() PATCH call with CSRF token; 5 other raw fetch() calls exempt by path prefix
CSRF: Updated all 4 test auth fixtures (auth_headers, auth_headers_tenant_a/b, authenticated_client) with CSRF double-submit tokens
CSRF: 12 new integration tests covering block/allow/mismatch/safe-methods/exempt-paths/api-key-bypass/cookie-behavior
Tenant isolation: Added tenant_key filter to AgentJob lookup in simple_handover.py
Tenant isolation: Replaced db.get(Project) with tenant-scoped select() in orchestration.py
TenantManager: Added register_test_tenant() classmethod, replaced 3 direct _validation_cache accesses in smoke conftest
deviations: Only 1 of 8 raw fetch() calls needed manual CSRF fix — 7 others exempt by path prefix (auth, setup, mcp-installer, download)
Discovered and fixed Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware bug: raise HTTPException wraps in ExceptionGroup -> 500; replaced with return JSONResponse
blockers_encountered: Pre-commit ruff-format and mixed-line-ending hooks required re-staging on first CSRF commit
sessions.notes_for_next: All security hardening complete. CSRF enabled with 12 tests. 2 tenant isolation fixes applied. TenantManager test coupling eliminated. 1422 tests passing (12 new CSRF), 342 skipped. Frontend builds clean. Branch ready for 0765g (Tenant Key + Encapsulation).
sessions.summary: Enabled CSRF double-submit cookie protection across full stack: fixed 3 middleware bugs (httponly, secure, Starlette ExceptionGroup), wired Axios interceptor + raw fetch fix, configured comprehensive exemptions. Fixed 2 tenant isolation pattern violations (defense-in-depth). Added TenantManager.register_test_tenant() to eliminate test coupling. 3 commits, 12 new tests, 1422 total passing.

Task 2: Added generate_implementation_prompt() public method to ThinClientPromptGenerator, replacing direct private _build_* method calls from prompts API endpoint.
Task 3: Extracted _apply_project_updates() and _build_project_data() helpers from update_project, with 19 new unit tests.
deviations: Task 3 subagent committed with 'test:' and 'refactor:' prefixes instead of 'cleanup(0765g):' convention
RegisterUserRequest.tenant_key default changed from hardcoded to None (field was unused by both endpoint handlers)
blockers_encountered: Pre-commit ruff-format and mixed-line-ending hooks required re-staging on both Task 1 and Task 2 commits
Task 3 subagent had 8 initial test failures due to Pydantic validation on Mock() project_type — fixed with proper mock fields
sessions.notes_for_next: All 3 tasks complete. 1441 tests passing (19 new), 342 skipped. Frontend builds clean. Zero hardcoded tenant keys remain. Branch ready for 0765h (Skipped Test Resolution).
sessions.summary: Removed all hardcoded tenant keys across 11 files via config-based resolution. Encapsulated prompt generation behind public API. Extracted 2 helpers from update_project with 19 tests. 4 commits total.

sessions.title: Design System Sample Page
planned_tasks: Research Vuetify theme config and design tokens
Extract component patterns (buttons, cards, badges, typography)
Build self-contained HTML sample page with dark theme
Cross-reference with branding guide, document discrepancies
tasks_completed: Researched 8 frontend config files and 6 Vue components, extracted all design tokens
Built self-contained HTML sample page as design system single source of truth
Resolved all 6 discrepancies with user — all decisions applied to the sample page
User-approved design decisions documented directly in the HTML reference
Added all AI tool icon variants (claude_pix, Claude_AI_symbol, codex_mark_white) with usage context per component
Removed light-theme-only assets (Giljo_gray_Face, Giljo_BY_Face, codex_logo, codex_mark, Giljo_BY_active, Giljo_BY_thinker, Giljo_gray_Face_happy)
Added brand hierarchy (Company Logo, Product Logo, Gil the Mascot) and nav/state icons
Added toggle switches (OFF: faded blue, ON: green #67bd6d + yellow glow), radio buttons (#ffc300 primary), checkboxes (#ffc300 fill)
Added dropdown/select (outlined variant, focus border #ffc300, menu bg #182739, selected highlight rgba(255,195,0,0.12))
Added progress bars — stepper bar (yellow in-progress, green at 100%) + v-progress-linear (primary/success/error)
Added tabs (bordered Settings style + button toggle ProjectTabs style) with opacity-based states
Added navigation sidebar (active: #ffc300 text + rgba bg, collapse chevron with hover)
Added generic chips (Connected/Reconnecting/Disconnected tonal, Active Product flat, series chip)
Added dialogs/modals (4 title bar colors: info/warning/danger/success, surface bg #182739, sizes sm-xl)
Added alerts (v-alert tonal variant: 12% bg + left border + icon for success/error/warning/info)
Added toast notifications (success 4s, warning 6s, info 5s, error persistent; bottom-right; 300-500px; slide-in)
Added loading spinners (v-progress-circular: 18px/48px/64px, always primary #ffc300, always indeterminate)
Added Giljo icon replacement rule: all default agent/AI/bot icons from Vue libraries must use Giljo_YW_Face.svg
deviations: vuetify.js does not exist — theme lives in config/theme.js
Discovered statusConfig.js as additional source of status colors
All 6 original discrepancies resolved during interactive review with user
Progress bars are not gradient — solid yellow (#ffc300) that switches to green (#67bd6d) at 100% completion
Toggle OFF state uses faded blue rgba(33,150,243,0.4), not the expected #1e3147
blockers_encountered: Chrome MCP browser extension lost connection mid-session — required multiple reconnection attempts

design_decisions.single_source_of_truth: frontend/design-system-sample.html — all future frontend work must reference this file for colors, typography, spacing, and component patterns
design_decisions.agent_colors: Canonical source: agent-colors.scss / agentColors.js. design-tokens.scss values must be corrected to match
design_decisions.status_colors: Canonical source: statusConfig.js (waiting=#FFD700, working=#FFFFFF, blocked=#FF9800, complete=#67BD6D, failure=#C6298C). Both design-tokens.scss and agent-colors.scss CSS vars must be corrected
design_decisions.font_family: Roboto, sans-serif (remove Cairo declaration from design-tokens.scss)
design_decisions.border_radius: Unified 4-token scale: sharp=4px, default=8px, rounded=16px, pill=9999px (replaces both variables.scss and design-tokens.scss duplicate scales)
design_decisions.elevation: Surface lightening, not shadows. Flat=#0e1c2d, Raised=#182739, Elevated=#1e3147, Overlay=#243b53 (replaces invisible black shadow scales)
design_decisions.agent_badge_text: Cutout style — background color #0e1c2d as text, not white
design_decisions.agent_avatar_border: Subtle: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2), not solid white
design_decisions.dynamic_text_color: #ffc300 (brand yellow) for user-created names and entity identifiers (project names, task names, product names, agent names). Static labels stay #e1e1e1 or #8f97b7

sessions.notes_for_next: frontend/public/design-system-sample.html is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all design decisions. It now covers the COMPLETE component library: layout layers, color palette, buttons, text inputs, toggles, radio buttons, checkboxes, dropdowns, progress bars, tabs, navigation sidebar, chips, dialogs, alerts, toasts, spinners, agent role colors, status badges, typography with text color roles, spacing, elevation, border radius, gradients, AI tool colors + icons, brand hierarchy, nav/state icons, and scrollbar styling. Codebase files that need updating to match: design-tokens.scss (agent colors, status colors, font family, primary text color, radius/shadow scales), agent-colors.scss (status CSS vars).
sessions.summary: Built and iteratively refined comprehensive design system sample page with user across 3 commits. Resolved all 6 discrepancies through interactive review. Established frontend/public/design-system-sample.html as the single source of truth. Added full interactive component library: toggles, radios, checkboxes, dropdowns, progress bars (stepper + linear), tabs (2 styles), navigation sidebar, generic chips, dialogs (4 types), alerts (4 types), toast notifications (4 types with auto-dismiss timers), loading spinners (3 sizes). Documented all AI tool icon variants with component usage context. Removed all light-theme-only assets. Added Giljo icon replacement rule for all agent/AI icons.
